pull.title: BIP-0127: Prune some unfinished part and mark complete
pull.body: I haven't worked at projects related to this BIP for many years. The second part of the BIP was not entirely finished and never implemented by anyone I am aware of. The former part is still useful as a general-purpose construction that I hear some projects have adopted in some similar shape or form.

labels.name: BIP Update by Owner
labels.description: PR by Author or Deputy to modify their own BIP

events.message:
bip-127: Remove uncomplete and unused protocol buffers part

This part was never implemented by anyone and it is not complete in the
current state.

events.body: LGTM, would a mail list announcement about removal of the file format part be a good idea here?

verification.payload:
tree 71ee3b49b9121b4185f811c781695b56a4c19979
parent 7563199c2d9bb0c57465d1caa6f98f49fa54f2c1
author Steven Roose <steven@stevenroose.org> 1779373723 +0200
committer Murch <murch@murch.one> 1779375621 -0700

bip-127: Mark complete

events.body:
> LGTM, would a mail list announcement about removal of the file format part be a good idea here?

Yes, and the addition of a Changelog recording the change would also be good.

I added the table entry update that was missing.

Edit:
@stevenroose: I added a Changelog as discussed out of band. Please lemme know if [that](https://github.com/bitcoin/bips/pull/2168/changes/fefc5c192548716e14bcae0422fc93bd44b2dabe) looks good to you.

bip127: Add Changelog

events.body:
ACK

Will send a mail list announcement about removal of the file format part and status update to complete.
